brief.redesign_brief: The current crawled site appears inaccessible or misconfigured, with pages showing blocked rapidresultsearch.com content, a domain-for-sale link, and no usable original business information. The redesign should keep only the confirmed domain context and Brisbane roofing intent implied by the URL, while urgently improving content recoverability, trust, conversion clarity, and local SEO. Before build, the client needs to provide or approve verified business details, services, licences, images, testimonials, and contact information so the new site can replace a broken experience with a credible, enquiry-focused roofing website.

ready_to_build_concerns: No real customer website content was available in the scrape.
Domain appears to show blocked ad/parking or safeframe content rather than the intended business website.
A domain-for-sale link appears on multiple pages.
Business name, phone, email, address, services, licences, owner, testimonials, logo, and brand assets are missing.
Do not build final copy from this scrape alone; client verification is required before production.
